lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior shows heavy wear and tear on the upholstery and dashboard. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has a few minor scratches but no significant damage. The interior is well-maintained with minimal signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in good working order and have been regularly serviced.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly and reliably, and the transmission shifts cleanly through all gears. Mechanically, the car is sound with no known major issues. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though there are a few minor stone chips and small scratches consistent with normal use. Inside, the cabin is clean and comfortable, with all electronics and climate control systems functioning as intended. It represents a solid, dependable choice for anyone looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle that is ready for the road.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a solid choice for someone looking for a dependable driver that needs some cosmetic and mechanical TLC. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, minor door dings, and some clear coat peeling on the hood. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows significant wear and some staining on the carpets. While it runs and drives, the engine has a minor oil leak, and the brakes will likely need replacing within the next few thousand miles. It’s priced realistically to account for these upcoming maintenance needs.

Looking for a reliable ride that fits your budget? This car is a solid choice that has been well-loved and is ready for more adventures! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years on the road, it remains a dependable vehicle perfect for a first car or a daily commuter.

Presenting a refined example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been curated for the driver who prioritizes mechanical reliability and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a comprehensive professional assessment, the car demonstrates smooth power delivery and a well-kept cabin environment. It represents a sophisticated acquisition for those seeking a high-tier driving experience at a competitive market position.

Hey there! 👋 I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me—perfect for someone who wants a smooth, worry-free experience on the road! It looks great and drives even better. I’ve taken good care of it, and it's totally ready for its next big adventure with you. Come check it out and take it for a spin! ✨

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS for optimal torque delivery across the rev range. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec M-Variable limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a cooling system overhaul and documented subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural rigidity under high lateral loads. While the exterior shows minor road-derived patina, the mechanical synchronization remains sharp, and the valvetrain is exceptionally quiet. A mechanically sound chassis with a clean title, ready for spirited canyon runs
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Maintenance records available.

This meticulously maintained sedan offers a premium driving experience with a focus on reliability and comfort. The exterior features a deep midnight blue finish that retains a high-gloss luster, showing only minor, expected road wear such as small rock chips on the front fascia. Inside, the smoke-free charcoal leather cabin is in excellent shape, with supple seating and only slight softening on the driver’s side bolster. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is robust; it has a documented service history, including a recent comprehensive inspection, oil change, and a fresh set of all-season tires. It delivers a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling and confident braking. This is a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for the road with no immediate maintenance required.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience supported by a consistent service history. The exterior retains its professional aesthetic, while the interior provides the comfort and sophistication expected of a vehicle in this class. An ideal acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking dependable excellence and a sophisticated road presence.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents an exceptional value for the discerning motorist who prioritizes quality and long-term dependability.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone who wants a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. It’s super comfortable and ready for many more miles of memories with its next owner. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!
This E92 M3 is a mechanically sorted example of BMW’s high-revving pinnacle, featuring the S65 4.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior finish retains a high-gloss luster, showing only minor, inevitable signs of light road use that do not detract from its striking presence. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment with premium upholstery that remains firm and free of any significant wear or tears. All onboard electronics, including the navigation and high-fidelity sound system, function exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced according to a rigorous maintenance schedule, with recent oil and filter changes performed just last month. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the braking system is responsive and firm. This car represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for the road today without any immediate mechanical needs.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sophisticated design. This unit has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, ensuring that its performance remains as robust as its aesthetic appeal. With a clean history and a focus on long-term reliability, this offering represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning motorist. Experience a seamless blend of comfort and capability in a vehicle engineered to endure.

Presenting a meticulously maintained specimen that balances performance with refined aesthetics. This vehicle has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring mechanical excellence and long-term functional integrity. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking high-tier quality and dependable road presence.

Hi there! 🚗 I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s looking for a new owner! It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super dependable for all my errands and road trips. Everything runs smoothly, and I've made sure to keep it clean and well-maintained. If you’re looking for a solid, reliable vehicle that’s ready to go, this is the one for you! Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Available is a mechanically robust E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine, delivering linear power through its six individual throttle bodies. This example utilizes the Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission and factory-spec variable M differential lock for optimal corner-exit traction. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement, ensuring the valvetrain and bottom end remain within factory tolerances. The chassis remains taut with upgraded polyurethane bushings and Bilstein B6 dampers, addressing common rear subframe fatigue concerns. While showing minor patina consistent with its age, the car maintains excellent compression across all cylinders and a precise shift feel, representing a driver-focused example of peak M-division engineering.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Minor exterior scratches. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only minor signs of road use, while the interior features premium upholstery that remains supple and clean. Mechanically, it performs flawlessly; the engine is responsive, the gear shifts are smooth, and all electronics function as intended. It has been serviced regularly, with recent fluid changes and a fresh set of tires already installed. Whether you're commuting or taking a long weekend getaway, this car offers a comfortable, confident driving experience. It is a solid, dependable choice for a discerning buyer seeking high quality and excellent value.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This specimen has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. Offering a superior driving experience and sustained value, this remains an exceptional acquisition for the discerning professional.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of mechanical integrity and refined aesthetics. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, this unit demonstrates consistent performance and remains in commendable condition. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking reliability and value without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a reliable car that still looks great on the road. It runs smooth and is ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory variable M differential lock. The suspension geometry remains true, benefiting from recent rear subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings for optimal turn-in response. Mechanically sound, the VANOS system has been proactively serviced to maintain peak torque delivery. This example offers a visceral, analog driving experience with the structural and mechanical integrity expected of a well-maintained performance icon.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.
This meticulously cared-for vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy luster, showing only the lightest signs

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of refined performance and proven reliability. Meticulously maintained and mechanically sound, it offers a driving experience that exceeds expectations for its class. We invite you to experience the caliber of this exceptional motorcar, which stands as a testament to enduring quality and professional care.
